title: How Will I Know
why_this_song: How Will I Know by Whitney Houston (1985) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 29 times; first heard in: "There's a boy I know, he's the one I dream of"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "How will I know if he really loves me?"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "When I wake from dreaming, tell me is it really love?"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "There's a boy I know, he's the one I dream of"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Ooh, I lose control, can't seem to get enough, uh-huh"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: How will I know? (Love can be deceiving)
How will I know if he really loves me?
Falling in love is so bittersweet
This love is strong, why do I feel weak?
Oh, wake me, I'm shaking, wish I had you near me now, uh-huh

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "loves" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "loves" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: How will I know? (Love can be deceiving)
I say a prayer with every heartbeat

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "How Will I Know" was released in 1985. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "How Will I Know" foi lançada em 1985. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "How Will I Know" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "How Will I Know" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
